decisions.rationale: Edit handlers are placeholder toasts — FV-8 fail; decompose scope promises CRUD workflows. Wire update popups/APIs.
AdminResourcesTab lacks IR bubble-id depth on tag/flag/action rows vs AdminPathsTab; AC-2 partial.
Admin sub-tab buttons ignore Button_tab_/Button_tab_active_ style_refs already used elsewhere in app.
adminResourcesApi vs pathsResourcesApi duplication is drift risk but not an AC blocker for SET-09.
Coverage artifact hygiene (empty mapped_target_files, overstated 100%) — process fix, not feature rewrite.

summary: 3 fix_now (edit CRUD, resource card IR markers, sub-tab styles), 2 defer. rewrite_required true before SET-10 advance.
